title: Enzyme-Substrate Activity Prediction

target.name: activity
target.description: Binary indicator for whether a halogenase enzyme converts the substrate in NaBr.

feature_descriptions.sequence: Halogenase amino-acid sequence in one-letter code.
feature_descriptions.substrate: Canonical SMILES string for the candidate substrate.
feature_descriptions.activity: Training label: 1 if conversion activity was observed, else 0.

domain_background: Substrate-cold halogenase activity prediction. Test substrates are unseen during training, while test enzymes appear in the training set.
allowed_external_resources: Use public scientific databases, package documentation, and pretrained biological or chemistry models. Do not use hidden labels or scorer files.
